title: fips-provider-next bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.2.0-5.0.1]
- Replace upstream reference

[1.2.0-5]
- Fix Requires/Provider to fix default install of fips providers

[1.2.0-4]
- Update to OpenSSL 3.5.1 as base version

[1.2.0-3]
- Fix FIPS dispatcher table missing termination

[1.2.0-2]
- Add CI configuration (OSCI) and gating.yaml

[1.2.0-1]
- Initial commit on c9s
full_text:
[1.2.0-5.0.1]
- Replace upstream reference

[1.2.0-5]
- Fix Requires/Provider to fix default install of fips providers

[1.2.0-4]
- Update to OpenSSL 3.5.1 as base version

[1.2.0-3]
- Fix FIPS dispatcher table missing termination

[1.2.0-2]
- Add CI configuration (OSCI) and gating.yaml

[1.2.0-1]
- Initial commit on c9s

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20819.html
